MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-13-2021 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION FILED BY PETITIONER UHURU, KARIOKI AS TO RESPONDENT BECERRA, XAVIER , ATTORNEY GENERAL, CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-01-2021 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION, 302, PETITIONER KARIOKI UHURU'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON WRIT OF MANDATE: OFF CALENDAR. PETITIONER DID NOT SERVE AND FILE THIS MOTION AT LEAST 16 COURT DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING, AS REQUIRED BY CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 1005(B). PETITIONER IS ALSO REQUIRED TO FILE AND SERVE A SUPPORTING MEMORANDUM, PROOF OF SERVICE, AND PARTY DECLARATION, AS REQUIRED BY RULES OF COURT RULE 3.1112-1113 AND CODE OF CIV. PROC. SECTION 1088.5. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/EPS)
NOTICE OF HEARING ON WRIT OF MANDATE & PAYMENT FOR COURT REPORTER FEE (TRANSACTION ID # 66419714) FILED BY PETITIONER UHURU, KARIOKI HEARING SET FOR APR-01-2021 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER KARIOKI UHURU'S WRIT OF MANDATE WITH ATTACHMENT A. THE MATTER IS CALLED. MR. UHURU INFORMS THE COURT THAT HE DID NOT NOTIFY OPPOSING COUNSEL OF HIS APPEARANCE THIS MORNING. THE COURT READS THE TENTATIVE RULING INTO THE RECORD. BRIEF DISCUSSIONS ARE HELD. AT THE CONCLUSION OF THE DISCUSSIONS, THE TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON WRIT OF MANDATE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. PETITIONER HAS NOT COMPLIED WITH JUDGE SCHULMAN'S APRIL 1, 2021 ORDER; MOST NOTABLY HE HAS NOT FILED AND SERVED A SUPPORTING MEMORANDUM. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER; CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA; COURT REPORTER: ROSE MILLER, CSR NO. 5041, EMAIL: RMILLERCSR@GMAIL.COM. (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Writ Of Mandate With Attachment A
Off Calendar May-13-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (via ZOOM videoconference):
Karioki Uhuru, Self-Represented Petitioner;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

PETITIONER KARIOKI UHURU'S Writ Of Mandate With Attachment A.

The matter is called. Mr. Uhuru informs the Court that he did not notify opposing counsel of his appearance this morning. The Court reads the tentative ruling into the record. Brief DISCUSSIONS are held. The Court informs Mr. Uhuru that he did not comply with Judge Schulman's April 1, 2021.

At the conclusion of the discussions, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

Petitioner's notice of hearing on writ of mandate is ordered off calendar. Petitioner has not complied with Judge Schulman's April 1, 2021 order; most notably he has not filed and served a supporting memorandum.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Court Reporter: Rose Miller, CSR No. 5041, Email: RMillerCSR@gmail.com. (302/RBU)

Notice Of Hearing On Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Apr-01-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER KARIOKI UHURU'S Notice Of Hearing On Writ Of Mandate:

Off calendar. Petitioner did not serve and file this motion at least 16 court days before the hearing, as required by Code of Civil Procedure section 1005(b). Petitioner is also required to file and serve a supporting memorandum, proof of service, and party declaration, as required by Rules of Court Rule 3.1112-1113 and Code of Civ. Proc. section 1088.5.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
